overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a robed character exploring a medieval castle at night. The character walks from an outdoor courtyard through a long stone corridor lit by wall lanterns, then enters a grand hall with chandeliers and long dining tables.

events.description: character moves from outdoor courtyard into covered stone corridor entrance
ambient light shifts from moonlight to warm artificial lantern light

agents.ego_description: walking from the castle courtyard into the entrance corridor, passing stone columns and exterior lanterns

entered.detail: tall stone building facade with multiple glowing lit windows
cobblestone pathway leading to the castle entrance
ornate golden wall-mounted lanterns emitting warm yellow light
thick stone pillars supporting the covered entrance overhang

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dark castle courtyard at night, with the character walking toward a stone building entrance. Warm light glows from windows and exterior wall lanterns as the character enters the covered corridor, transitioning from moonlight to artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: long stone corridor with gothic arches and wall lanterns

events.description: passing diamond-paned windows set into the stone wall revealing exterior darkness
character slows down as approaching the large wooden door at the corridor end

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the long corridor, passing arched doorways and illuminated wall lanterns

entered.detail: rough-hewn stone block walls with gothic arched recesses
large rectangular stone paving slabs with weathered texture
heavy beamed wooden ceiling running the length of the corridor
gothic windows with lead-lined diamond-patterned glass panes
heavy arched wooden door with iron hinges at the corridor terminus

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, enclosed stone corridor illuminated by warm wall lanterns. The rough stone walls feature arched recesses and occasional diamond-paned windows. The segment ends as the character approaches a large wooden door at the corridor's end.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand dining hall with vaulted ceiling and chandeliers

events.description: character opens the large wooden door and enters the great hall from the corridor
bright warm illumination from multiple chandeliers fills the large open space

agents.ego_description: entering the great hall and walking between long dining tables, observing the high vaulted ceilings and stained glass windows

entered.detail: large ornate iron chandeliers with multiple candles hanging from the high ceiling
long wooden dining tables with benches arranged in parallel rows
tall gothic arched windows with blue and gold stained glass panels
massive stone fireplace with burning fire and ornate mantelpiece
decorative woven banners hanging on the stone walls

segments.scene_description: The character enters a vast, open great hall with a high vaulted ceiling illuminated by glowing chandeliers. Long wooden dining tables line the space, while tall stained glass windows and a large stone fireplace adorn the walls. The character explores the grand interior, moving from the entrance toward the far end of the hall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a moonlit outdoor courtyard into the expansive, warmly lit interior of a medieval great hall. It begins in the dark night air, following a robed character toward a stone entrance where the cool moonlight gives way to the glow of exterior wall lanterns. As the character steps inside, the scene shifts into a narrow, enclosed stone corridor characterized by rough walls and arched recesses illuminated by flickering lanterns. The camera then follows the character through the corridor toward a large wooden door, which opens to reveal a vast hall with high vaulted ceilings and glowing chandeliers. Finally, the space expands completely as the character moves past long wooden dining tables and stained glass windows toward the far end of the grand interior.
